app.title: OpenTrafficMap
app.author: moooo99
app.description: Real-time traffic congestion data on a open map infrastructure
proposed_tests: Clone the repository and install required dependencies
Start the Open Traffic Map service and verify data feed
Test querying the API with sample traffic data
